label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out this soccer position swapping problem. So there are five people on the team: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. They each start in specific positions: - Alice: right winger - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: left winger - Dave: cheerleader - Eve: goalkeeper Then there are a series of swaps. Let me go through each swap step by step and track where each person ends up. First swap: Dave and Bob trade positions. So initially, Dave is a cheerleader and Bob is a right midfielder. After swapping, Dave becomes the right midfielder and Bob becomes the cheerleader. Let me note that down: After first swap: - Alice: right winger - Bob: cheerleader - Claire: left winger - Dave: right midfielder - Eve: goalkeeper Second swap: Dave and Eve trade positions. Before this swap, Dave is right midfielder and Eve is goalkeeper. So after swapping, Dave becomes goalkeeper and Eve becomes right midfielder. After second swap: - Alice: right winger - Bob: cheerleader - Claire: left winger - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: right midfielder Third swap: Alice and Bob trade positions. Before this swap, Alice is right winger and Bob is cheerleader. After swapping, Alice becomes cheerleader and Bob becomes right winger. After third swap: - Alice: cheerleader - Bob: right winger - Claire: left winger - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: right midfielder Fourth swap: Dave and Claire trade positions. Before this swap, Dave is goalkeeper and Claire is left winger. After swapping, Dave becomes left winger and Claire becomes goalkeeper. After fourth swap: - Alice: cheerleader - Bob: right winger - Claire: goalkeeper - Dave: left winger - Eve: right midfielder Fifth swap: Dave and Eve trade positions. Before this swap, Dave is left winger and Eve is right midfielder. After swapping, Dave becomes right midfielder and Eve becomes left winger. After fifth swap: - Alice: cheerleader - Bob: right winger - Claire: goalkeeper - Dave: right midfielder - Eve: left winger So at the end of the match, Bob is playing right winger. The answer should be option (A). Let me double-check my steps to make sure I didn't make a mistake. First swap: Dave (cheerleader) and Bob (right midfielder) swap → Bob is cheerleader. Second swap: Dave (now right midfielder) and Eve (goalkeeper) swap → Dave is goalkeeper, Eve is right midfielder. Third swap: Alice (right winger) and Bob (cheerleader) swap → Alice is cheerleader, Bob is right winger. Fourth swap: Dave (goalkeeper) and Claire (left winger) swap → Dave is left winger, Claire is goalkeeper. Fifth swap: Dave (left winger) and Eve (right midfielder)
